title: Accuser (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Accuser''''' was the name of two known [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history:

*The '''''[[Emancipator]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] originally named the '''''Accuser'''''
*The '''''[[Accuser (720 light freighter)|Accuser]]''''', a [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]]

{{Disambig}}
